allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
test\(ipc\): add integration tests for 15 IPC handlers

Created comprehensive integration tests for the following IPC handlers:
- advanced-memory.ts
- auth.ts
- brain.ts
- dialog.ts
- extension.ts
- file-diff.ts
- files.ts
- gallery.ts
- git.ts
- idea-generator.ts
- mcp.ts
- mcp-marketplace.ts
- process.ts
- proxy.ts
- proxy-embed.ts

Updated TODO.md to mark completed items and added changelog entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
